title: Bare nlinarith fails on Nesbitt's inequality without clearing denominators
informal_statement: Nesbitt's inequality `a/(b+c) + b/(a+c) + c/(a+b) >= 3/2` for positive reals a, b, c, attacked with bare `nlinarith` (square hints supplied, but no denominator-clearing) before a clear-denominators-then-nlinarith proof closed the same episode.

failure.input_context_summary: Goal `a / (b + c) + b / (a + c) + c / (a + b) â‰Ą 3 / 2` over â„ť with `a, b, c > 0`; no rewriting of the division terms attempted first.
failure.attempt_summary: Submitted `nlinarith [sq_nonneg (a-b), sq_nonneg (b-c), sq_nonneg (a-c), mul_pos ha hb, mul_pos hb hc, mul_pos ha hc]` directly on the raw goal as the first solve action in a tracked episode. The kernel returned 'linarith failed to find a contradiction' â€” nlinarith cannot relate the three division atoms `a/(b+c)`, `b/(a+c)`, `c/(a+b)` to each other or to the square/positivity hints without first clearing denominators into a single polynomial inequality. Three further steps in the same episode iterated toward a fix: an inline-`by` flattened-sequence parse trap, a stale lemma name (`le_div_iff` vs. this Mathlib rev's `le_div_iffâ‚€`), and finally `div_add_div` (twice) + `le_div_iffâ‚€` to clear denominators, after which the same square/positivity hints closed it via nlinarith, reaching kernel_verified.
failure.lesson: nlinarith/linarith cannot reason through division atoms with variable, nonlinear denominators; clear denominators first (e.g. `div_add_div` + `le_div_iffâ‚€`, or `field_simp` followed by `rw [div_le_div_iff ...]`) before supplying square-nonnegativity and positivity hints to nlinarith.

notes: Captured via tracked proof-search episode f300e689-9670-45f4-8454-47e4e80b73ac (problem_version 7adeaf8c-df55-4be6-8ddd-68ffcd4b00fd, environment_hash 9e26d28efe88484c36562da27aa22a2cc73a0638d11532cbbc9071a60609025d): step 1 (bare nlinarith on the raw division goal) recorded kernel_fail with 'linarith failed to find a contradiction'; step 4 (div_add_div Ă—2 + le_div_iffâ‚€, then nlinarith) closed the same episode kernel_verified as packets/elementary/inequalities/nesbitt_three_var.v1.json.
